## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or limitation this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you have considered.

## Scope Check

This is a public demonstration repository. Features must remain:

- [ ] Free of proprietary algorithms (Shannon Entropy only)
- [ ] Free of client data, credentials, or connection strings
- [ ] Safe for public GitHub

## Additional Context

Add any other context, diagrams, or references.
